title: Krateo ClickStack wrapper values
description: Values for the Krateo ClickStack blueprint wrapper. Top-level knobs are Krateo-facing; everything under `clickstack` is forwarded to the upstream ClickStack 3.0.0 subchart.

exposure.title: HyperDX exposure
exposure.description: How the HyperDX UI/app service is exposed externally. Replaces the obs-stack LoadBalancer patch and hardcoded GCP IP.

type.title: Exposure type
type.description: Service exposure mode for HyperDX. Maps to clickstack.hyperdx.service.type (or Ingress when Ingress).

hyperdxHost.title: HyperDX host
hyperdxHost.description: External host or IP used to build FRONTEND_URL / NEXTAUTH_URL. Empty keeps upstream localhost defaults.

namespaces.title: Namespaces
namespaces.description: Namespaces for the folded-in ConfigMap and Secrets.

storageClassName.title: StorageClass name
storageClassName.description: Default StorageClass threaded into the ClickHouse/Keeper/MongoDB dataVolumeClaimSpec. Empty uses the cluster default.
